seoTitle: Penshurst vs Pental Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Penshurst and Pental Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Penshurst vs Pental Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Penshurst and Pental Island.
heading: Penshurst vs Pental Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Penshurst, Victoria and Pental Island, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pental Island has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Penshurst (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Penshurst or Pental Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Penshurst has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Pental Island scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Penshurst scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Pental Island scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Penshurst or Pental Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pental Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
